deliverable1_lever_analysis.flashinfer_note: FlashInfer batch-1 SDPA 36.05us/layer vs FlashInfer 48.20us/layer (#349); slower at batch=1
deliverable1_lever_analysis.l_kernel_note: custom Marlin W4A16 kernel already in BASELINE_TPS #354; L_kernel=1.0 on spec substrate
deliverable1_lever_analysis.l_quant_gated_by: MEASURED Gemma PPL at b* (denken #356), NOT literature
deliverable1_lever_analysis.l_step_source: CUDA Graphs A10G ceiling 3-5%; H100 20.6% arXiv 2605.30571v1 Table 3

deliverable2_ppl_forecast.caveat: Llama-2-lineage deltas; Gemma-4-E4B (GQA/shared-KV, MLP gating) may scale differently. Used as a prior to bracket expectations, NOT to close L_quant. The headroom is only 0.043 PPL (~1.8% rel), so the literature prior LEANS toward violation, but the measured Gemma PPL at b* is what decides the verdict.

deliverable3_composite_tps.note: int4 branch (PPL-excluded): precap 505.61, cap 473.5296 -> eff 473.5296 (SHORT 500). sub-int4 branch (PPL-viable, b*=3): precap 661.57, cap 585.00 -> eff 585.00 (CLEARS 500).

deliverable4_verdict.flip_explanation: Two coupled gates at b*=3bpw (denken ceiling 585.00 >= 500): (1) PPL gate — measured Gemma PPL <= 2.42 opens sub-int4 (supply cap 585.00); PPL > 2.42 -> int4 cap 473.5296 NO-GO (gap 26.4704). (2) identity gate — eta_total = eta_attn(0.000, stark #363 FREE) + lm_head; clears iff <= 0.0402 (flip at lm_head eta 0.0402). The blanket 9.841% would NOT have fit; the decomposition is what could open the door.

identity.decomposition_note: stark #363 (a0oi2esq, MERGED): attention-locus identity tax FREE (eta~0, ratio 0.9167, best K=8, M-invariant fixed-split-k). Verify-locus eta = attn(~0) + lm_head; the blanket 9.841% (> 4.02% budget) is superseded. stark #365 measures lmhead_bi_gemm_eta (pending).

deliverable4_verdict.verdict_text: PENDING measured input(s): denken#356_ppl_at_b_star, stark#365_lmhead_bi_gemm_eta — composite is a 2-gate fork (PPL@b* x lm_head identity eta); both gates must clear for >500.

assumptions: BASELINE_TPS=481.53 is the current best strict-compliant serve point at int4 (#354).
ceiling(4.0)=473.5295953446407 is method-independent (#332 geometric-phi supply floor).
Arithmetic intensity at M=1 is 4.0, well below ridge point 208.3 (pure BW-bound).
BODY_FRAC=0.943 reflects batch=1 HBM traffic decomposition (#344 waterfall).
caveats: COMPOSITE VERDICT IS MULTI-ROUTE and HELD. The NOW-PRIMARY route is demand-side (denken #377 coverage closer); the eta-axis deflated (#373 insufficient + #375 un-deployable) and the supply-side mixed-precision path is PPL-blocked (lawine #372). private-500 reachable <=> (Route A supply-side clears) OR (Route B demand-side closes). All cross-PR numbers are consumed via the PR thread, NOT by reading other branches.

COUPLING ASSUMPTION TO CONFIRM (flagged for advisor): I model the routes as OR-combined (reachable if EITHER closes) with demand-side primary, and I treat denken #377's c*>=0.9010 as ALREADY-SIZED to close the private-500 residual (I do not re-derive coverage->E[T]->private-500). The demand route closes iff BOTH harden: denken #380 deliverability survives conservative AND ubel #379 finds a positive coverage-addressable gap. If instead the routes are AND-coupled, or the demand closer must be re-priced against a specific residual number, tell me and I will re-wire the combiner.

GAP CHANNEL NOT RE-DERIVED: denken #377's 0.3914pp/coverage gap-elasticity is its least-grounded input; per the advisor I PULL ubel #379's coverage->gap split (--gap-coverage-addressable-pp) rather than computing a gap-closure number myself. Until it lands the gap channel (and thus the demand route) stays PENDING.

DELIVERABILITY IS A PRIOR, NOT BANKED: p_deliver~1.0 rests on #339's modeled N(0.0385,0.0074) and the kappa=0.672 int4-ct transfer (delivered-after-kappa ~0.0259 still exceeds the required robust 0.0107). denken #380 must confirm recipe_is_real / deliverability_survives_conservative before the target is banked hard.

The triple-tail corner (conservative ceiling 509.07 AND conservative rho 0.8038 AND worst c*=0.9256 = 136% of #336's budget) is a low-probability simultaneous worst-case that also ignores the gap co-benefit; it is a SENSITIVITY BAND, not the central operating point.

ROUTE A still PENDING two measured inputs consumed via the PR thread: denken #356's Gemma-4-E4B ppl_at_best_sub_int4_bits at b*, AND stark #365's lmhead_bi_gemm_eta. We do NOT re-run either GPU eval (denken owns the single measured-PPL gate, stark owns the lm_head identity gate; each runs once). Route A leans dead (PPL-blocked + eta deflated).

Identity gate: stark #363 (MERGED) measured the attention-locus identity tax as FREE (eta~0, ratio 0.9167, best K=8), so verify-locus eta = eta_attn(~0) + eta_lmhead. The >500 budget ETA_BUDGET_500 = 1 - 500/LAMBDA_CEIL ~= 4.02% is the slack the lambda ceiling (520.953, PPL-only/no-supply-tax) can absorb and stay >=500. We evaluate the identity gate against THAT ceiling as relayed; the precise coupling of eta to the sub-int4 supply substrate is stark/denken's to confirm. eta_attn=0 is an upper-bound-optimistic read of stark #363's ratio<1 result (best K=8 was actually faster than the deployed heuristic).

ceiling(b) anchors {4.0:473.53, 3.5:523, 3.0:585} are advisor-relayed samples of denken #356's curve; the published curve supersedes them on the terminal re-run. Piecewise-linear interpolation between anchors; extrapolation below 3.0 bpw is flagged.

L_quant(b) is a batch=1 BW-bound Amdahl model on BODY_FRAC=0.943 (#344). It assumes the body GEMM read traffic scales linearly with bits and the non-body fraction is fixed; real sub-int4 kernels carry dequant overhead that would lower the realized gain.

Sub-int4 also needs a kernel: Marlin W4A16 (arXiv 2408.11743) is 4-bit only; a viable sub-int4 path requires a compatible low-bit kernel (GPTQ-style W3/W2 or codebook). The ceiling(b) curve presumes such a kernel exists at the stated overhead.
L_step CUDA-Graphs ceiling 3-5% is an A10G literature estimate; actual benefit depends on graph capture overhead and the model call graph and may be lower than 3%.
All numbers are for strict greedy token-identity (argmax bit-identical). Relaxing to approximate speculative decoding is a different research question outside this scope.
The PPL-viable branch is evaluated at b*=3bpw; if denken's best viable bits differ, re-evaluate ceiling(b*) and L_quant(b*) at that bit-width.

deliverable6_demand_side_route.note: denken #377 (030uc5mk, merged, independently verified) SIZED c* >= 0.9010 as the costed demand-side residual closer for private-500 (Δcov robust 0.0107 = 35% of #336's 0.031 envelope; central 0.00565 = 18%). Non-iid is 1.41x pricier than the deprecated #373 iid model (slope 11.12->7.91 via the a1=0.7293 cliff + kappa=0.672 int4-ct transfer). The route is the NOW-PRIMARY path (eta-axis deflated: #373 insufficient + #375 un-deployable) but HELD pending denken #380 (deliverability survives conservative) + ubel #379 (coverage->gap split). We pull ubel's split rather than re-deriving the 0.3914pp/unit gap elasticity (#377's least-grounded input).

deliverable7_composite_verdict.verdict_text: private-500 reachability HELD — multi-route fork, demand-side (denken #377) is the NOW-PRIMARY route (eta-axis deflated: #373 insufficient + #375 un-deployable). Route B (demand-side coverage c* >= 0.901): PENDING PENDING_denken380_deliverability_and_or_ubel379_gap_split. Route A (supply-side sub-int4 + identity): PENDING (PPL-blocked per lawine #372 / eta-axis deflated -> leans dead). Pending inputs: ['denken#356_ppl_at_b_star', 'stark#365_lmhead_bi_gemm_eta', 'denken#380_deliverability_survives_conservative', 'ubel#379_coverage_to_gap_split'].

deliverable_identity_locus.decomposition_note: stark #363 (a0oi2esq, MERGED): attention-locus identity tax FREE (eta~0, ratio 0.9167, best K=8, M-invariant fixed-split-k). Verify-locus eta = attn(~0) + lm_head; the blanket 9.841% (> 4.02% budget) is superseded. stark #365 measures lmhead_bi_gemm_eta (pending).

synthesis.handoff: COMPOSITE VERDICT HELD — multi-route fork, demand-side (denken #377) is the NOW-PRIMARY route (eta-axis deflated: #373 insufficient + #375 un-deployable). Pending inputs: ['denken#356_ppl_at_b_star', 'stark#365_lmhead_bi_gemm_eta', 'denken#380_deliverability_survives_conservative', 'ubel#379_coverage_to_gap_split']. ROUTE B (demand-side coverage, PRIMARY): retrain drafter to c* >= 0.901 (Δcov robust 0.0107 = 35% of #336's 0.031 envelope; non-iid 1.41x pricier than the deprecated #373 iid model). HELD: PENDING_denken380_deliverability_and_or_ubel379_gap_split -- pending denken #380 (deliverability survives conservative; modeled p~1.0 via #339 N(0.0385,0.0074) x kappa=0.672) + ubel #379 (coverage->gap split of the 4.295pp public->private gap). ROUTE A (supply-side sub-int4 + identity): PENDING denken #356 PPL@b* + stark #365 lm_head eta -- leans dead (mixed-precision PPL-blocked per lawine #372; eta-axis deflated). At b*=3bpw: int4 cap 473.53 NO-GO; sub-int4 cap 585.00 (eff 585.00) iff PPL+identity clear.

imports.provenance: lawine #196 (TPS_NONSPEC=165.44), wirbel #326 (TPS_SPEC_OFFSHELF_BI=357.32, ETA_KERNEL_OFFSHELF=0.3141), wirbel #354 (BASELINE_TPS=481.53 int4 custom Marlin W4A16), denken #332 y5cl0ena (ceiling(4.0)=473.5295953446407 method-independent batched-verify BW floor, LAMBDA_CEIL=520.9527323111674), denken #356 ceiling(b) curve anchors {3.0:585, 3.5:523} (advisor-relayed in PR #357 review), denken #344 waterfall (BODY_FRAC=0.943 STEP_US=1218.2), kasane #349 (FlashInfer batch-1 excluded: SDPA 36.05us vs FlashInfer 48.20us/layer). Identity-locus decomposition: stark #363 a0oi2esq (attention-locus identity tax FREE, eta~0, ratio 0.9167, best K=8, M-invariant fixed-split-k); stark #365 (lmhead_bi_gemm_eta MEASURED, pending) — verify-locus eta = attn(~0) + lm_head, supersedes blanket 9.841%; >500 budget ETA_BUDGET_500 = 1 - 500/520.9527 = 0.04022. Literature PRIOR (non-authoritative): QuIP# arXiv:2402.04396 (int2 +1.19 PPL); AQLM arXiv:2401.06118 (int2 +1.47 PPL); QTIP arXiv:2406.11235 (int2 +1.70 PPL); TesseraQ+AWQ arXiv:2410.19103 (int2 +1.35 PPL); Marlin arXiv:2408.11743 (W4A16 4-bit only); CUDA Graphs arXiv:2605.30571v1 Table 3 (H100 20.6% step overhead; A10G 3-5% ceiling). PPL gate: deployed 2.3772 gate 2.42 headroom 0.043; the AUTHORITATIVE sub-int4 PPL is denken #356's MEASURED Gemma-4-E4B value at b* (pending). DEMAND-SIDE (now-primary; advisor-relayed 16:02Z): denken #377 030uc5mk (merged, independently verified) recommended_retrain_target c*>=0.9010, Δcov robust 0.0107 / central 0.00565, non-iid cov->E[T] slope 7.91 (vs iid 11.12, 1.41x pricier) anchored on #289 a1=0.7293 cliff, kappa=0.672 int4-ct transfer, gap_shrink 0.3914pp/cov of the 4.295pp public->private gap, within #336's +0.031 envelope (35% robust / 18% central), triple-tail out-of-budget corner (ceil 509.07, rho 0.8038, c* 0.9256 = 136%); deliverability prior #339 N(0.0385,0.0074). Eta-axis deflated (#373 insufficient + #375 un-deployable); supply-side mixed-precision PPL-blocked (lawine #372). PENDING hardening: denken #380 (deliverability_survives_conservative / recipe_is_real) + ubel #379 (coverage->gap split).
